headline: Trump 🚢 BLOCKADES Iran 💥 – OIL PRICES GO BRRR 📈😩
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊👑 dropping TRUTH BOMBS 💣📱 on Truth Social 🚀 after JD VANCE 🧔‍♂️🇺🇸's DIPLO FAIL 😤 in Islamabad 🕌 – no NUCLEAR DEAL 🤝☢️ cuz Iran SIMPS 🐑 for HORMUZ TOLLS 💰🚫 and HOUTHI 👹 + HEZBALLAH 🤡 proxies! US NAVY 🛳️🔒 LOCKED & LOADED 🔫💦, CLEARING MINES 🧨🧹 from STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🌊🚢 to SLAP ILLEGAL TOLLS 😡 – 'NO SAFE PASSAGE 🛑🌊 for PAYPIGS 💸🐷!' Trump YEETS naval BLOCKADE 🚢⛓️ on IRANIAN PORTS 🏛️🚫, choking their OIL DADDY 💦🛢️ cashflow like a Python squeeze 🐍💥!

WALL STREET SWEATS 😰💦 over OIL SPIKE 📈🤑 – CHINA 🐉📱 chugging Iranian crude like ZUCK'S META JUICE 🤖🍹, how TF do we BOARD foreign ships 🚢👮‍♂️ without WW3 GOATSE 🌍💥? CENTCOM 📡🔥 tweaks it to FULL STOP 🛑 on IRAN TRAFFIC 🚛 – SENATOR MARK WARNER 🤓📺 CNN-SIMPING: 'Blockade = Iran OPEN SESAME? LOL NOPE 😂🗝️!' MIKE TURNER 🗳️ CBS FACE THE NATION 📺 yells 'CALLING ALLIES TO THE TABLE 🍽️🤝 – TRUMP NOT LETTING IRAN DECIDE SHIPPING LANE 🎮!'

POLL PANIC 📊😱: 59% AMURKANS say WAR SUCKS 🐟📉 – HORMUZ FREE? NUCLEAR NUKE'D ☢️❌? IRANIAN PEEPS LIBERATED 🕊️? ZIP ZERO NADA 🚫! TRUMP to FOX 🦊: 'Iran GONNA GIVE US EVERYTHING 👑💦 – OIL HIGH? ECONOMY BUILDS THE WALL 🧱📈!' GAMBLE CITY 🎰🍀 with MIDTERMS LOOMING 🗳️😬 – GOP Cucks 🐔💸 if OIL CRASHES harder than UFC KNOCKOUTS 👊💥!

Speaking of – TRUMP jets to MIAMI 🏖️🥊 for UFC CAGE MATCH ORGY 🥋💦, CHATTING RUBIO 🧔‍♂️🤝 + ADVISORS mid-BLOOD BATH 🩸🥊 while VANCE NEGO-FLOPS in PAKISTAN 🇵🇰😩! UFC has RULES ⏰🏆 + CLEAR WINNERS 🥇, but IRAN WAR? ENDLESS GRAPPLE 😤🤼‍♂️ into MONTH 2, 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE CRUMBLING 🧨⏳ like Epstein's client list 🍆📜! TEST OF WILLS 💪😡 – IRAN TANKING STRIKES 🏗️💥 vs TRUMP'S PAIN TOLERANCE for ECONO-WOES 📉😢 + BASE RAGEQUIT 🐸💨.

LAST WEEK Trump CHOKE'D 😵‍💫 between BOMBING CIVVIES 🏥🚀 (BAD OPTICS 👀) or PUSSYING OUT on 'NO ENDLESS WARS' PROMISE 🕊️🤥 – SUPPORTERS SIMPING HARD 🤤 but POLLS SAY 'FIX IT DADDY' 📈! CEASEFIRE? VICTORY LAP? NAH, SAME PREDICAMENTS 😩🔄 – EVERYONE GETS BTFO'D in this MIDEAST MEATGRINDER 🥩🔥! Follow ANTHONY ZURCHER'S US POLITICS UNSPUN 📰🍆 for more Trump 2.0 TWISTS 🌀👑!
